channel.title: bothSidesHeadlinesNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from bothSidesHeadlinesNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Immigration officer is charged with assault after protest outside Colorado ICE facility, DA says
item.description: A Colorado district attorney has charged an immigration agent after a protester said she was held in a chokehold during demonstrations against the det...

item.title: Tesla profits rose in the first quarter as Musk teases debut of new Roadster
item.description: Tesla's profit rose in the first quarter as its car sales rebounded from a sharp slump in 2025

item.title: Millions of Americans may now also be considered Canadian under new law
item.description: Potentially millions of Americans suddenly have a much easier path to Canadian citizenship

item.title: Airline company Lufthansa cuts 20,000 flights as war squeezes fuel prices and supplies
item.description: The German company that owns Lufthansa Airlines and other European carriers says it plans to cut 20,000 short-haul flights through October as the Iran...

item.title: Groups sue Alaska election officials, allege the sharing of voter data with DOJ was unconstitutional
item.description: Voting and civil rights groups are suing Alaska elections officials, alleging their sharing of the state’s voter registration list with the U.S. Depar...
